payload.description:
## Problem
In the dashboard, selecting a row in the Items, Scorecards, and Data grids shows both a background highlight and an outline ring. Evaluations and Procedures currently only show the background highlight and are missing the outline ring.

## Expected Behavior
Evaluations and Procedures should render the same selected-row outline style as Items/Scorecards/Data.

## Scope
- Add missing selected-state outline for Evaluations grid
- Add missing selected-state outline for Procedures grid
- No behavior or interaction changes beyond the missing outline style
payload.title: Restore selected-row outline in Evaluations and Procedures tables
